title: Fragrant Leafy Thai Shrimp Boat Noodles
description: A low-fat Thai shrimp dish wrapped in tamarind-leaf boats, fragrant with makrut lime leaves and a glossy, dehydrate-style sauce.
instructions: In a saucepan combine tamarind paste, fish sauce, brown sugar, garlic, ginger, lime juice, coconut milk and water; bring to a simmer
Add makrut lime leaves and let the broth simmer for 5 minutes to infuse flavor
Stir in shrimp and cook until pink, about 3 minutes, then remove from heat
Lay a whole makrut lime leaf flat on a plate; spoon 2 tablespoons of shrimp mixture onto it
Fold the leaf into a boat shape, sealing the edges with a toothpick if needed
Warm the filled leaf boats in a steamer for 2 minutes to soften the wrap
Sprinkle torn basil leaves and a pinch of chili flakes over the boats
Drizzle leftover broth over the boats for a glossy finish
Serve immediately with a side of unsweetened coconut yogurt for dipping
